Feather
Type: Material
Value: 0
Fine Value: 6
Properties:
Bankable:     Droppable:
Sellable:     Tradable:

A beautiful, light, and aerodynamic bird's feather.

The Feather item is a material.

Contents

  • 1 Uses
    • 1.1 Recipe Ingredient
  • 2 Sources
    • 2.1 Activity Drops
    • 2.2 Chest Drops

Uses

Recipe Ingredient

Feather is an ingredient in the following recipes:

Item Name Service
Requirement 		Skills Materials
Used 		Recipe
Outputs
Fletch copper arrows Needs Basic Sawmill service or better. Carpentry lvl. 2 1x Copper bar
1x Birch logs
5x Feather		 5x Copper arrows
Fletch bronze arrows Needs Basic Sawmill service or better. Carpentry lvl. 12 1x Bronze bar
1x Pine logs
5x Feather		 5x Bronze arrows
Fletch iron arrows Needs Basic Sawmill service or better. Carpentry lvl. 22 1x Iron bar
1x Spruce logs
5x Feather		 5x Iron arrows
Fletch steel arrows Needs Basic Sawmill service or better. Carpentry lvl. 32 1x Steel bar
1x Maple logs
5x Feather		 5x Steel arrows
Fletch tarsilium arrows Needs Basic Sawmill service or better. Carpentry lvl. 42 1x Tarsilium bar
1x Teak logs
5x Feather		 5x Tarsilium arrows
Fletch farganite arrows Needs Advanced Sawmill service or better. Carpentry lvl. 52 1x Farganite bar
1x Mangrove logs
5x Feather		 5x Farganite arrows

Sources

Activity Drops

Activity Name Skills Quantity Chance Odds Base
Rate 		W.E.A.R.‡
Bird feeding Hunting lvl. 5 3-5 97.750%† ~1 in 1 actions 12 steps 9 steps
Bird watching Hunting lvl. 40 25-35 60.000% ~1 in 2 actions 12 steps 8 steps

†Note: This activity rolls for loot more than once.
‡W.E.A.R is a value that shows the average steps for one item at maximum work efficiency.

Chest Drops

Chest Name Quantity Chance
(Per Roll) 		Chance
(Per Chest)† 		Odds
(Per Roll)
Bird nest 5-10 28.571% 73.969% ~1 in 1 chests
(~1 in 4 rolls)
Hunting chest 10-20 8.335% 29.398% ~1 in 3 chests
(~1 in 12 rolls)

†Note: Chests roll for loot multiple times.

Related Items

Light
Material

Adventurers' enamel pin, Boxtrap
Bronze arrows, Copper arrows
Dark feather, Elderhide scraps

Gold nugget, Halfmaw scales
Halfmaw teeth, Hide scraps
Iron arrows, Kelp drift net
Metal scrap, Name tag
Pepper, Sea shell
Silver nugget, Steel arrows
Tarsilium arrows, Wood scrap
